title: melica minuta subsp. latifolia
intro: Melica minuta subsp. latifolia, also known as a type of wild grass, is a plant species in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Melica minuta subsp. latifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
